<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Garagenflohmarkt Wittlensweiler – 09. Mai 2026</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,700;0,9..144,900;1,9..144,300&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --blue:   #1a2f6e;
    --yellow: #f7d116;
    --red:    #cc2222;
    --green:  #2e8b22;
    --light-blue: #e8f0ff;
    --light-yellow: #fffbe6;
    --light-red: #fff0f0;
    --light-green: #eaf5ea;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: #f2f4f8;
    color: #222;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }

  /* ── COLOR BAR ── */
  .color-bar { height: 6px; display: flex; }
  .cb1 { flex:1; background: var(--red); }
  .cb2 { flex:1; background: var(--yellow); }
  .cb3 { flex:1; background: var(--green); }
  .cb4 { flex:1; background: var(--blue); }

  /* ── HEADER ── */
  header {
    background: var(--blue);
    padding: 28px 0 0;
  }

  .header-inner {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 24px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .header-text .eyebrow {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: #a8b8e8;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .header-text h1 {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 6vw, 54px);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: #fff;
    line-height: 1.0;
  }

  .header-text .subtitle {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: clamp(20px, 3vw, 26px);
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--yellow);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .header-logo {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 8px;
    width: 90px;
    height: 78px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .header-logo img { width: 100%; height: auto; }

  /* ── META PILLS ── */
  .meta-row {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 20px 24px 0;
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .meta-pill {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.13);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28);
    border-radius: 40px;
    padding: 8px 18px;
  }

  .meta-pill .ml { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 3px; color: #a8b8e8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .meta-pill .mv { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; }

  /* ── CATEGORIES STRIP ── */
  .categories {
    background: var(--yellow);
    padding: 14px 0;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }

  .categories-inner {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 24px;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .cat-tag {
    background: var(--blue);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 5px 14px;
    border-radius: 4px;
  }

  /* ── TABS ── */
  .tabs-wrapper {
    background: var(--blue);
    padding-bottom: 0;
  }

  .tabs-inner {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 16px 24px 0;
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
  }

  .tab-btn {
    padding: 12px 28px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.1);
    color: #a8b8e8;
  }

  .tab-btn.active {
    background: #f2f4f8;
    color: var(--blue);
  }

  .tab-btn:not(.active):hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
    color: #fff;
  }

  /* ── MAIN CONTENT ── */
  .main {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 32px 24px 60px;
  }

  .tab-panel { display: none; }
  .tab-panel.active { display: block; }

  /* ── SECTION LABEL ── */
  .section-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  /* ── LAUFKARTE TAB ── */
  .laufkarte-hero {
    background: var(--light-red);
    border-top: 4px solid var(--red);
    border-radius: 0 10px 10px 10px;
    padding: 28px 32px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .laufkarte-hero .section-label { color: var(--red); }

  .laufkarte-hero p {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: #333;
    max-width: 640px;
  }

  .hl-red { background: var(--red); color: #fff; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 13px; }
  .hl-yellow { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 13px; }

  /* Steps */
  .steps-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .step-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 20px 18px;
    border-top: 4px solid var(--blue);
    text-align: center;
  }

  .step-num {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--blue);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 900;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    border: 2px solid var(--blue);
  }

  .step-card h3 { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .step-card p { font-size: 13px; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; }

  /* QR Card */
  .qr-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 28px 32px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 32px;
    border-left: 5px solid var(--red);
  }

  .qr-box {
    background: #fff;
    border: 2px solid var(--blue);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .qr-info h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .qr-info p { font-size: 13px; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .qr-url { font-size: 11px; color: #888; font-style: italic; }

  .download-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 12px;
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 9px 20px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .download-btn:hover { background: #a81a1a; }

  /* ── WEGEPLAN TAB ── */
  .wegeplan-hero {
    background: var(--light-blue);
    border-top: 4px solid var(--blue);
    border-radius: 0 10px 10px 10px;
    padding: 28px 32px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .wegeplan-hero .section-label { color: var(--blue); }
  .wegeplan-hero p { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; color: #333; max-width: 640px; }

  .map-placeholder {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #dce4f0;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .map-header {
    background: var(--blue);
    padding: 14px 20px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .map-header span { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #a8b8e8; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .map-header .map-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--yellow); }

  .map-body {
    height: 300px;
    background: #e8edf5;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Decorative street map */
  .map-body svg { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; }

  .map-pin {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -100%);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .map-pin .pin-label {
    background: var(--blue);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .map-pin .pin-dot {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--red);
    border: 3px solid #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  }

  .wegeplan-qr-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
  }

  .wegeplan-qr-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 24px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    border-top: 4px solid var(--blue);
  }

  .wegeplan-qr-card h3 { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .wegeplan-qr-card p { font-size: 12px; color: #666; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 16px; }

  /* ── PROGRAM CARDS ── */
  .program-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .prog-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px 18px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--red);
  }

  .prog-card:nth-child(2) { border-left-color: var(--green); }
  .prog-card:nth-child(3) { border-left-color: var(--yellow); }
  .prog-card:nth-child(4) { border-left-color: var(--blue); }

  .prog-card h4 { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px; }
  .prog-card p { font-size: 12px; color: #444; line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ── ANMELDUNG BANNER ── */
  .anmeldung-banner {
    background: var(--light-green);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 22px 28px;
    border-left: 5px solid var(--green);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 24px;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .anmeldung-banner .section-label { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .anmeldung-banner .email { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .anmeldung-banner .deadline { font-size: 13px; color: #444; }

  .standgebuehr-badge {
    background: var(--green);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 10px 18px;
    text-align: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .standgebuehr-badge .sg-label { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #c8f0c8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .standgebuehr-badge .sg-val { font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; line-height: 1; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer { background: var(--blue); padding: 16px 24px; }
  .footer-inner { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  .footer-inner .fl { font-size: 11px; color: #a8b8e8; }
  .footer-inner .fr { font-size: 11px; color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 600; }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .steps-grid, .program-grid, .wegeplan-qr-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .qr-card { flex-direction: column; }
    .anmeldung-banner { flex-direction: column; }
    .header-inner { flex-direction: column; }
    .tabs-inner { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="color-bar"><div class="cb1"></div><div class="cb2"></div><div class="cb3"></div><div class="cb4"></div></div>

<header>
  <div class="header-inner">
    <div class="header-text">
      <div class="eyebrow">Herzliche Einladung</div>
      <h1>Garagenflohmarkt</h1>
      <div class="subtitle">Wittlensweiler</div>
    </div>
    <div class="header-logo">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kita Logo">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="meta-row">
    <div class="meta-pill"><div class="ml">Datum</div><div class="mv">Sa. 09. Mai 2026</div></div>
    <div class="meta-pill"><div class="ml">Uhrzeit</div><div class="mv">10 – 16 Uhr</div></div>
    <div class="meta-pill"><div class="ml">Eintritt</div><div class="mv">Frei</div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="categories">
    <div class="categories-inner">
      <div class="cat-tag">Kleidung</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Hausrat</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Trödel</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Kleinmöbel</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Spielzeug</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tabs-wrapper">
    <div class="tabs-inner">
      <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('active')});document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active')});document.getElementById('tab-laufkarte').classList.add('active');this.classList.add('active')">🗺 Laufkarte</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('active')});document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active')});document.getElementById('tab-wegeplan').classList.add('active');this.classList.add('active')">📍 Wegeplan</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<main class="main">

  <!-- ═══════ LAUFKARTE TAB ═══════ -->
  <div class="tab-panel active" id="tab-laufkarte">

    <div class="laufkarte-hero">
      <div class="section-label">Kinder-Rätsel-Aktion</div>
      <p>
        An jedem Verkaufsstand liegt ein <span class="hl-red">Kita-Rätsel</span> aus.
        Für jede richtige Lösung gibt es einen Stempel — ist die Laufkarte voll,
        wartet im Kita-Garten eine <span class="hl-yellow">Belohnung</span> auf euch!
        Für alle Kinder jeden Alters.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="steps-grid">
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">1</div>
        <h3>Laufkarte holen</h3>
        <p>Laufkarte ausdrucken oder direkt in der <strong>Kita Wittlensweiler</strong> abholen.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">2</div>
        <h3>Rätsel lösen</h3>
        <p>An jedem Stand das <strong>Kita-Rätsel</strong> lösen und einen <strong>Stempel</strong> sammeln.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">3</div>
        <h3>Belohnung abholen</h3>
        <p>Volle Laufkarte im <strong>Kita-Garten</strong> einlösen und Belohnung abholen!</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border-left:5px solid var(--red);box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);">
      <div style="padding:20px 28px 16px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:6px;">Tier-Rallye Laufkarte</div>
          <h3 style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:4px;">Sammle alle 15 Stempel!</h3>
          <p style="font-size:13px;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">Löse an jedem Stand das Tier-Rätsel und hol dir deinen Stempel.<br>Ist die Karte voll, wartet im Kita-Garten eine Belohnung auf dich!</p>
        </div>
        <a href="data:image/jpeg;base64," download="Laufkarte_Garagenflohmarkt_Wittlensweiler.jpg" class="download-btn" style="flex-shrink:0;">Laufkarte herunterladen ↓</a>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:0 28px 24px;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Tier-Rallye Laufkarte" style="width:100%;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #e8e0d0;display:block;"/>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="anmeldung-banner" style="margin-top:24px;">
      <div>
        <div class="section-label" style="color:#1a7a1a;">Anmeldung Verkaufsstand</div>
        <div class="email"><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="503b3924317d273924243c353e232735393c35221035267d3b3932352a7d3634237e3435">[email&#160;protected]</a></div>
        <div class="deadline">Anmeldeschluss: <strong>Do. 30. April 2026</strong></div>
      </div>
      <div class="standgebuehr-badge">
        <div class="sg-label">Standgebühr</div>
        <div class="sg-val">8 €</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- ═══════ WEGEPLAN TAB ═══════ -->
  <div class="tab-panel" id="tab-wegeplan">

    <div class="wegeplan-hero">
      <div class="section-label" style="color:#1a2f6e;">Alle Garagen auf einen Blick</div>
      <p>Der Wegeplan zeigt dir alle teilnehmenden Garagen in Wittlensweiler. Scanne den QR-Code oder besuche unsere Webseite für die interaktive Karte.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Decorative map placeholder -->
    <div class="map-placeholder">
      <div class="map-header">
        <span>Wittlensweiler – Übersichtskarte</span>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
          <div class="map-dot" style="background:var(--red);"></div>
          <div class="map-dot" style="background:var(--yellow);"></div>
          <div class="map-dot" style="background:var(--green);"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="map-body">
        <!-- Decorative street grid -->
        <svg viewBox="0 0 900 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <rect width="900" height="300" fill="#dce8f0"/>
          <!-- Streets -->
          <rect x="0" y="130" width="900" height="18" fill="#c5d5e8"/>
          <rect x="0" y="60" width="900" height="12" fill="#c5d5e8"/>
          <rect x="0" y="220" width="900" height="12" fill="#c5d5e8"/>
          <rect x="150" y="0" width="14" height="300" fill="#c5d5e8"/>
          <rect x="380" y="0" width="14" height="300" fill="#c5d5e8"/>
          <rect x="620" y="0" width="14" height="300" fill="#c5d5e8"/>
          <rect x="800" y="0" width="14" height="300" fill="#c5d5e8"/>
          <!-- Building blocks -->
          <rect x="20" y="20" width="110" height="30" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="20" y="80" width="110" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="175" y="20" width="185" height="30" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="175" y="80" width="80" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="270" y="80" width="95" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="415" y="20" width="180" height="30" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="415" y="80" width="80" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="510" y="80" width="90" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="650" y="20" width="130" height="30" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="650" y="80" width="130" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="20" y="165" width="110" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="175" y="165" width="185" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="415" y="165" width="180" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="650" y="165" width="130" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="20" y="240" width="110" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="175" y="240" width="185" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="415" y="240" width="180" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <rect x="650" y="240" width="130" height="40" rx="3" fill="#b8ccdc"/>
          <!-- Garage markers -->
          <circle cx="80" cy="170" r="10" fill="#cc2222" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/>
          <text x="80" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">1</text>
          <circle cx="260" cy="170" r="10" fill="#cc2222" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/>
          <text x="260" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">2</text>
          <circle cx="505" cy="138" r="10" fill="#cc2222" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/>
          <text x="505" y="142" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">3</text>
          <circle cx="715" cy="170" r="10" fill="#cc2222" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/>
          <text x="715" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">4</text>
          <!-- Kita marker -->
          <rect x="380" y="118" width="54" height="24" rx="4" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
          <text x="407" y="134" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#f7d116">★ KITA</text>
          <!-- Street labels -->
          <text x="450" y="128" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#7a90a8">Hauptstraße</text>
          <text x="450" y="58" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#7a90a8">Gartenweg</text>
        </svg>
        <div style="position:absolute;bottom:12px;right:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;font-size:10px;color:#333;border:1px solid #ccc;">
          ● Garagestandort &nbsp; ★ Kita (Start/Ziel)
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="wegeplan-qr-row">
      <div class="wegeplan-qr-card">
        <h3>Wegeplan QR-Code</h3>
        <p>Scanne den QR-Code für die interaktive Karte aller Garagen-Standorte</p>
        <div class="qr-box" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
          <svg width="110" height="110" viewBox="0 0 270 270" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <rect width="270" height="270" fill="white"/>
            <rect x="10" y="10" width="70" height="70" rx="3" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="20" y="20" width="50" height="50" rx="2" fill="white"/>
            <rect x="30" y="30" width="30" height="30" rx="1" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="190" y="10" width="70" height="70" rx="3" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="200" y="20" width="50" height="50" rx="2" fill="white"/>
            <rect x="210" y="30" width="30" height="30" rx="1" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="10" y="190" width="70" height="70" rx="3" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="20" y="200" width="50" height="50" rx="2" fill="white"/>
            <rect x="30" y="210" width="30" height="30" rx="1" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="100" y="10" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="130" y="10" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="160" y="10" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="110" y="30" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="150" y="30" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="100" y="50" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="140" y="50" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="120" y="70" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="160" y="70" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="10" y="100" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="50" y="100" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="100" y="100" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="140" y="100" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="190" y="100" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="240" y="100" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="110" y="120" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="150" y="120" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="200" y="120" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="100" y="140" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="130" y="140" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="220" y="140" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="110" y="190" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="160" y="190" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="200" y="190" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="100" y="210" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="140" y="210" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="180" y="210" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="220" y="210" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="250" y="210" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="110" y="230" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="150" y="230" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="190" y="230" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="230" y="230" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="100" y="250" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="140" y="250" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="170" y="250" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="210" y="250" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
            <rect x="250" y="250" width="10" height="10" fill="#1a2f6e"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="qr-url">www.kita-wittlensweiler.de/wegeplan</div>
      </div>

      <div class="wegeplan-qr-card" style="border-top-color:var(--green); background:var(--light-green);">
        <h3 style="color:var(--green);">Organisation &amp; Bewirtung</h3>
        <p>Offener Garten für alle von <strong>12:00–15:00 Uhr</strong> durch die Evangelische Kita Wittlensweiler</p>
        <div style="margin-top:auto;">
          <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;border-left:4px solid var(--green);">
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Programm</div>
            <ul style="font-size:12px;color:#444;line-height:1.9;list-style:none;padding:0;">
              <li>🎟 Tombola – jedes Los gewinnt</li>
              <li>🎪 Hüpfburg &amp; Kinderschminken*</li>
              <li>🍔 Maultaschenburger &amp; Getränke</li>
            </ul>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:#888;margin-top:6px;">* gegen kleinen Unkostenbeitrag</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</main>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span class="fl">Ev. Kita Wittlensweiler · Sa. 09. Mai 2026 · 10–16 Uhr</span>
    <span class="fr">Eintritt frei · Für alle offen</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<div class="color-bar"><div class="cb1"></div><div class="cb2"></div><div class="cb3"></div><div class="cb4"></div></div>

E html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Garagenflohmarkt Wittlensweiler – 09. Mai 2026</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,700;0,9..144,900;1,9..144,300&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --blue:   #1a2f6e;
    --yellow: #f7d116;
    --red:    #cc2222;
    --green:  #2e8b22;
    --light-blue: #e8f0ff;
    --light-yellow: #fffbe6;
    --light-red: #fff0f0;
    --light-green: #eaf5ea;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: #f2f4f8;
    color: #222;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }

  /* ── COLOR BAR ── */
  .color-bar { height: 6px; display: flex; }
  .cb1 { flex:1; background: var(--red); }
  .cb2 { flex:1; background: var(--yellow); }
  .cb3 { flex:1; background: var(--green); }
  .cb4 { flex:1; background: var(--blue); }

  /* ── HEADER ── */
  header {
    background: var(--blue);
    padding: 28px 0 0;
  }

  .header-inner {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 24px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .header-text .eyebrow {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: #a8b8e8;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .header-text h1 {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 6vw, 54px);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: #fff;
    line-height: 1.0;
  }

  .header-text .subtitle {
    font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: clamp(20px, 3vw, 26px);
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--yellow);
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .header-logo {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 8px;
    width: 90px;
    height: 78px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .header-logo img { width: 100%; height: auto; }

  /* ── META PILLS ── */
  .meta-row {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 20px 24px 0;
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .meta-pill {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.13);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28);
    border-radius: 40px;
    padding: 8px 18px;
  }

  .meta-pill .ml { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 3px; color: #a8b8e8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .meta-pill .mv { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; }

  /* ── CATEGORIES STRIP ── */
  .categories {
    background: var(--yellow);
    padding: 14px 0;
    margin-top: 24px;
  }

  .categories-inner {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 24px;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .cat-tag {
    background: var(--blue);
    color: var(--yellow);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 5px 14px;
    border-radius: 4px;
  }

  /* ── TABS ── */
  .tabs-wrapper {
    background: var(--blue);
    padding-bottom: 0;
  }

  .tabs-inner {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 16px 24px 0;
    display: flex;
    gap: 4px;
  }

  .tab-btn {
    padding: 12px 28px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.1);
    color: #a8b8e8;
  }

  .tab-btn.active {
    background: #f2f4f8;
    color: var(--blue);
  }

  .tab-btn:not(.active):hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
    color: #fff;
  }

  /* ── MAIN CONTENT ── */
  .main {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 32px 24px 60px;
  }

  .tab-panel { display: none; }
  .tab-panel.active { display: block; }

  /* ── SECTION LABEL ── */
  .section-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  /* ── LAUFKARTE TAB ── */
  .laufkarte-hero {
    background: var(--light-red);
    border-top: 4px solid var(--red);
    border-radius: 0 10px 10px 10px;
    padding: 28px 32px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .laufkarte-hero .section-label { color: var(--red); }

  .laufkarte-hero p {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: #333;
    max-width: 640px;
  }

  .hl-red { background: var(--red); color: #fff; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 13px; }
  .hl-yellow { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 13px; }

  /* Steps */
  .steps-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .step-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 20px 18px;
    border-top: 4px solid var(--blue);
    text-align: center;
  }

  .step-num {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    color: var(--blue);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 900;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    border: 2px solid var(--blue);
  }

  .step-card h3 { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .step-card p { font-size: 13px; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; }

  /* QR Card */
  .qr-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 28px 32px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 32px;
    border-left: 5px solid var(--red);
  }

  .qr-box {
    background: #fff;
    border: 2px solid var(--blue);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .qr-info h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .qr-info p { font-size: 13px; color: #555; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .qr-url { font-size: 11px; color: #888; font-style: italic; }

  .download-btn {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 12px;
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 9px 20px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .download-btn:hover { background: #a81a1a; }

  /* ── WEGEPLAN TAB ── */
  .wegeplan-hero {
    background: var(--light-blue);
    border-top: 4px solid var(--blue);
    border-radius: 0 10px 10px 10px;
    padding: 28px 32px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .wegeplan-hero .section-label { color: var(--blue); }
  .wegeplan-hero p { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; color: #333; max-width: 640px; }

  .map-placeholder {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #dce4f0;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .map-header {
    background: var(--blue);
    padding: 14px 20px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .map-header span { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #a8b8e8; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .map-header .map-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--yellow); }

  .map-body {
    height: 300px;
    background: #e8edf5;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Decorative street map */
  .map-body svg { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; }

  .map-pin {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -100%);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .map-pin .pin-label {
    background: var(--blue);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .map-pin .pin-dot {
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--red);
    border: 3px solid #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  }

  .wegeplan-qr-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
  }

  .wegeplan-qr-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 24px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    border-top: 4px solid var(--blue);
  }

  .wegeplan-qr-card h3 { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .wegeplan-qr-card p { font-size: 12px; color: #666; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 16px; }

  /* ── PROGRAM CARDS ── */
  .program-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .prog-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px 18px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--red);
  }

  .prog-card:nth-child(2) { border-left-color: var(--green); }
  .prog-card:nth-child(3) { border-left-color: var(--yellow); }
  .prog-card:nth-child(4) { border-left-color: var(--blue); }

  .prog-card h4 { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px; }
  .prog-card p { font-size: 12px; color: #444; line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ── ANMELDUNG BANNER ── */
  .anmeldung-banner {
    background: var(--light-green);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 22px 28px;
    border-left: 5px solid var(--green);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 24px;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .anmeldung-banner .section-label { color: #1a7a1a; }
  .anmeldung-banner .email { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .anmeldung-banner .deadline { font-size: 13px; color: #444; }

  .standgebuehr-badge {
    background: var(--green);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 10px 18px;
    text-align: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .standgebuehr-badge .sg-label { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #c8f0c8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .standgebuehr-badge .sg-val { font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; line-height: 1; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer { background: var(--blue); padding: 16px 24px; }
  .footer-inner { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  .footer-inner .fl { font-size: 11px; color: #a8b8e8; }
  .footer-inner .fr { font-size: 11px; color: var(--yellow); font-weight: 600; }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .steps-grid, .program-grid, .wegeplan-qr-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .qr-card { flex-direction: column; }
    .anmeldung-banner { flex-direction: column; }
    .header-inner { flex-direction: column; }
    .tabs-inner { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="color-bar"><div class="cb1"></div><div class="cb2"></div><div class="cb3"></div><div class="cb4"></div></div>

<header>
  <div class="header-inner">
    <div class="header-text">
      <div class="eyebrow">Herzliche Einladung</div>
      <h1>Garagenflohmarkt</h1>
      <div class="subtitle">Wittlensweiler</div>
    </div>
    <div class="header-logo">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kita Logo">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="meta-row">
    <div class="meta-pill"><div class="ml">Datum</div><div class="mv">Sa. 09. Mai 2026</div></div>
    <div class="meta-pill"><div class="ml">Uhrzeit</div><div class="mv">10 – 16 Uhr</div></div>
    <div class="meta-pill"><div class="ml">Eintritt</div><div class="mv">Frei</div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="categories">
    <div class="categories-inner">
      <div class="cat-tag">Kleidung</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Hausrat</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Trödel</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Kleinmöbel</div>
      <div class="cat-tag">Spielzeug</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tabs-wrapper">
    <div class="tabs-inner">
      <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('active')});document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active')});document.getElementById('tab-laufkarte').classList.add('active');this.classList.add('active')">🗺 Laufkarte</button>
      <button class="tab-btn" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('active')});document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active')});document.getElementById('tab-wegeplan').classList.add('active');this.classList.add('active')">📍 Wegeplan</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<main class="main">

  <!-- ═══════ LAUFKARTE TAB ═══════ -->
  <div class="tab-panel active" id="tab-laufkarte">

    <div class="laufkarte-hero">
      <div class="section-label">Kinder-Rätsel-Aktion</div>
      <p>
        An jedem Verkaufsstand liegt ein <span class="hl-red">Kita-Rätsel</span> aus.
        Für jede richtige Lösung gibt es einen Stempel — ist die Laufkarte voll,
        wartet im Kita-Garten eine <span class="hl-yellow">Belohnung</span> auf euch!
        Für alle Kinder jeden Alters.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="steps-grid">
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">1</div>
        <h3>Laufkarte holen</h3>
        <p>Laufkarte ausdrucken oder direkt in der <strong>Kita Wittlensweiler</strong> abholen.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">2</div>
        <h3>Rätsel lösen</h3>
        <p>An jedem Stand das <strong>Kita-Rätsel</strong> lösen und einen <strong>Stempel</strong> sammeln.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="step-card">
        <div class="step-num">3</div>
        <h3>Belohnung abholen</h3>
        <p>Volle Laufkarte im <strong>Kita-Garten</strong> einlösen und Belohnung abholen!</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border-left:5px solid var(--red);box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08);">
      <div style="padding:20px 28px 16px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:6px;">Tier-Rallye Laufkarte</div>
          <h3 style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:4px;">Sammle alle 15 Stempel!</h3>
          <p style="font-size:13px;color:#555;line-height:1.6;">Löse an jedem Stand das Tier-Rätsel und hol dir deinen Stempel.<br>Ist die Karte voll, wartet im Kita-Garten eine Belohnung auf dich!</p>
        </div>
        <a href="data:image/jpeg;base64," download="Laufkarte_Garagenflohmarkt_Wittlensweiler.jpg" class="download-btn" style="flex-shrink:0;">Laufkarte herunterladen ↓</a>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:0 28px 24px;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Tier-Rallye Laufkarte" style="width:100%;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #e8e0d0;display:block;"/>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="anmeldung-banner" style="margin-top:24px;">
      <div>
        <div class="section-label" style="color:#1a7a1a;">Anmeldung Verkaufsstand</div>
        <div class="email"><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="670c0e13064a100e13130b02091410020e0b02152702114a0c0e05021d4a010314490302">[email&#160;protected]</a></div>
        <div class="deadline">Anmeldeschluss: <strong>Do. 30. April 2026</strong></div>
      </div>
      <div class="standgebuehr-badge">
        <div class="sg-label">Standgebühr</div>
        <div class="sg-val">8 €</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- ═══════ WEGEPLAN TAB ═══════ -->
  <div class="tab-panel" id="tab-wegeplan">

    <div class="wegeplan-hero">
      <div class="section-label" style="color:#1a2f6e;">Alle Garagen auf einen Blick</div>
      <p>Der Wegeplan zeigt dir alle teilnehmenden Garagen in Wittlensweiler. Scanne den QR-Code oder besuche unsere Webseite für die interaktive Karte.</p>
    </div>


    <div class="wegeplan-qr-row">
      <div class="wegeplan-qr-card">
        <h3>Wegeplan herunterladen</h3>
        <p>Lade den Wegeplan als PDF herunter und finde alle Garagen-Standorte auf einen Blick.</p>
        <div style="margin-top:auto; padding-top:20px;">
          <a href="wegeplan.pdf" download style="
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            background: var(--blue);
            color: #fff;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            padding: 14px 24px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: background 0.2s ease;
          " onmouseover="this.style.background='#122058'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#1a2f6e'">
            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/>
              <polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/>
              <line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/>
            </svg>
            Wegeplan als PDF
          </a>
        </div>
        <div class="qr-url" style="margin-top:12px;">www.kita-wittlensweiler.de/wegeplan</div>
      </div>

      <div class="wegeplan-qr-card" style="border-top-color:var(--green); background:var(--light-green);">
        <h3 style="color:var(--green);">Organisation &amp; Bewirtung</h3>
        <p>Offener Garten für alle von <strong>12:00–15:00 Uhr</strong> durch die Evangelische Kita Wittlensweiler</p>
        <div style="margin-top:auto;">
          <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;border-left:4px solid var(--green);">
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">Programm</div>
            <ul style="font-size:12px;color:#444;line-height:1.9;list-style:none;padding:0;">
              <li>🎟 Tombola – jedes Los gewinnt</li>
              <li>🎪 Hüpfburg &amp; Kinderschminken*</li>
              <li>🍔 Maultaschenburger &amp; Getränke</li>
            </ul>
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:#888;margin-top:6px;">* gegen kleinen Unkostenbeitrag</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</main>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span class
